---
title: "Home"
---

## \# Welcome to my Page

# About Me

![](images/clipboard-2432380023.jpeg){width="193"}

-   I’m Juan De La Cruz, a first-year Master of Science in Digital Marketing & Analytics student at Cal Poly Pomona.

-   I hold an MBA and dual bachelor’s degrees in Marketing Management and International Business, along with a minor in Hospitality Management.

-   I’ve worked across multiple industries, and my strongest passions are marketing, business analytics, international business, and sales.

-   I’m driven by the opportunity to make a positive impact, improve processes, and contribute meaningfully to the teams and organizations I work with.

# What I Do

-   I have experience across digital marketing, sales, e‑commerce, and analytics, working with diverse teams and professionals to lead and complete marketing projects.

-   I focus on understanding consumer behavior, improving user experience, and maintaining strong brand consistency across digital touchpoints.

-   I use analytics to uncover insights, tell meaningful stories, and solve business problems with data‑driven recommendations.

-   I apply a mix of creative and analytical skills to develop strategies that support organizational goals and improve performance.

-   I adapt quickly across industries and enjoy collaborating with cross‑functional teams to deliver impactful results.

-   I leverage a variety of marketing and analytics tools to evaluate performance, optimize campaigns, and guide decision‑making.

# What this Portfolio Shows

-   A collection of digital marketing projects I’ve completed.

<!-- -->

-   Marketing analytics work, including GA4 website traffic analysis.

-   A Revealjs data storytelling presentation.

-   My resume, background, and professional journey.

-   The skills, tools, and strategic thinking I bring to every project.

# Lets Connect!

I'm always looking to collaborate with professionals all around the world & sharing ideas in the marketing field. Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/juan-de-la-cruz-calderon/).
